---
title: "Section 3: Calculating Vaccine Effectiveness"
id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec03"
section_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec03"
session_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01"
toc: True
---




### In this section
<br>

- [Step-by-Step Calculation](OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec03-sp01.qmd)

- [Worked Example](OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec03-sp02.qmd)

- [Check Your Understanding](OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec03-sp03.qmd)

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">

            <span class="nav-title">Formula for Vaccine Effectiveness</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec03-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Step-by-Step Calculation</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
